linux.changelog: - Added settings for enabling/disabling autoinstall on startup\n- Refined autoinstall logic for linux \n- Updated mocap checks - now actively scans if any data has actually been receved from a new mocap multicast interface and shows debug hints

windows.changelog: Fixed breaking ubuntu 22 automatic update to 24 when both are available. Workflow now generates geneneric linux update key when just ubuntu 22 release is available and not both.

linux-ubuntu-24.04.changelog: Fixed breaking ubuntu 22 automatic update to 24 when both are available. Workflow now generates geneneric linux update key when just ubuntu 22 release is available and not both.

linux-ubuntu-22.04.changelog: Fixed breaking ubuntu 22 automatic update to 24 when both are available. Workflow now generates geneneric linux update key when just ubuntu 22 release is available and not both.
